'''鈭歞-v-s-ng''' ('''kadavsengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tucker|tucker]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-v-s-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tucker|tucker]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-v-s-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kadavsengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidavsengoko|thidavsengoko]] || [[word:jidavsengoko|jidavsengoko]] || [[word:shidavsengoko|shidavsengoko]] || [[word:kidavsengoko|kidavsengoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudavsengoko|thuthudavsengoko]] || [[word:jujudavsengoko|jujudavsengoko]] || [[word:shushudavsengoko|shushudavsengoko]] || [[word:kukudavsengoko|kukudavsengoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudavsengoko|thudavsengoko]] || [[word:judavsengoko|judavsengoko]] || [[word:shudavsengoko|shudavsengoko]] || [[word:kudavsengoko|kudavsengoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
